metadata.title: youin | Product backlog pinned to your UI
metadata.description: Create tasks on the exact UI element that needs work, with selector, screenshot, viewport, browser context, and discussion attached.

notFound.asideNote: * This link does not match a current page. Return to the dashboard or homepage to continue.
notFound.title: Page not found.
notFound.body: The URL might be mistyped, the page may have moved, or the link could be stale. Pick up from a known workspace surface and keep reviewing where your team ships work.
notFound.footer: youin — feedback on the live web

authShell.headline: Create the account. Start marking the product.
authShell.lead: YouIn keeps UI work attached to the live interface, then turns that context into tasks your team can actually resolve.
authShell.bullet1: Built for agencies and product teams working on live pages.
authShell.bullet2: Pins, selectors, screenshots, and discussion stay together.
authShell.bullet3: Invite reviewers after the workspace opens.

routeError.title: We couldn't finish loading this page.
routeError.body: The error has been logged. Try again — most failures here are transient (network blips, a slow query). If it keeps happening, head back to the dashboard and reopen the page.

bootstrap.title: Failed to load workspace
bootstrap.bodyFallback: Please try again or reload the page.

commandPalette.label: Command palette
commandPalette.description: Search, navigate, create marks, open saved views, and change theme.

actions.triageSub: Unassigned open marks grouped by page

hero.title: Your product backlog, pinned to your actual UI.
hero.subtitle: YouIn turns live interface moments into actionable work. Every mark keeps the page, element, screenshot, viewport, discussion, and status attached.
hero.pinNote: The page sells the same spatial model the product uses.

problem.title: The work is spatial. The tools are flat.
problem.p1: Review starts on the page, then gets flattened into screenshots, Slack archaeology, and tickets that say which button? YouIn keeps the work attached to the interface moment that created it.

loop.title: A backlog that remembers where the work is.

steps.title: Pin work to the live element
steps.body: Click the exact button, card, modal, table row, or empty state. YouIn captures the URL, selector, viewport, and screenshot automatically.

steps.title: Keep context after the page changes
steps.body: Tasks stay tied to the interface with selector, viewport, and screenshot fallbacks, so deployment drift does not turn review notes into guesswork.

steps.title: Move it through the backlog
steps.body: Triage, assign, discuss, and resolve the mark with visual context and workflow status in one place. No screenshot translation needed.

context.title: Every task arrives with the evidence already attached.
context.subtitle: YouIn keeps the page-level and element-level details together so reviewers, designers, and developers can move from observation to fix without rebuilding the scene.

items.label: Element
items.body: The mark points back to the exact interface object that triggered the work.

items.label: Capture
items.body: The visual state is preserved even when the next deploy shifts the layout.

items.label: Workflow
items.body: A mark behaves like real backlog work, not a loose comment floating in chat.

items.label: Workspace
items.body: Teams can triage open UI work by page, project, assignee, status, and priority.

items.label: Agencies
items.body: Client notes stay attached to the site instead of becoming a screenshot scavenger hunt.

items.label: Product teams
items.body: Design QA, copy fixes, and polish work enter the backlog with the same context they had on the page.

items.label: Indie builders
items.body: Capture the issue while you see it, then return later with the browser state still intact.

install.title: Stop describing the thing you can point at.
install.subtitle: The beta is free while the core workflow is shaped with early teams. The next time someone spots UI work, turn that exact element into the task.
install.pinNote: Final CTA, same rule: point once, keep the context.

popup.title: Youin
popup.badgeLocalAria: Feedback saved on this device only
popup.badgeSyncedAria: Signed in and connected to your workspace
popup.disabledOnSite: YouIn is disabled on this site.
popup.captureUnavailable: Open a website tab to review.
popup.inspectHint: Inspect an element, or drag any screen area.
popup.shortcutHint: Alt+Shift+Y toggles review on the page.
popup.localFeedbackHint: Saved on this device. Sign in to share it.
popup.signInHint: Use your workspace account to sync projects and feedback.
popup.continueGoogleAria: Continue with Google in a new tab

popup.noWorkspaceBody: Open the web app once to finish workspace setup, then reopen the popup.

popup.startReviewFailed: Reload the page, then try again.
popup.reloadPageHint: Reload the page, then try again.

widget.startInspectAria: Start element inspect review on this page
widget.startScreenshotAria: Start area screenshot review on this page
widget.startInspectWithCount: Start element inspect review. {count} open feedback items on this page.
widget.startScreenshotWithCount: Start area screenshot review. {count} open feedback items on this page.
widget.reviewMenuAria: Youin review — hover for capture modes

panel.regionAttached: This comment will stay attached to the selected area.
panel.elementAttached: This comment will stay attached to the selected element.
panel.noScreenshot: No screenshot available for this capture.
panel.savedOnDevice: Saved on this device until you sign in.
panel.willSync: Will sync to your workspace when you post.

panel.waitForScreenshot: Wait for the screenshot to finish, then post.
panel.regionCaptureFailed: Could not capture that area. Try the screenshot again.
panel.savedLocallySync: Saved locally. {error} Use Retry sync below or open the extension popup.
panel.title: Title
panel.reattachLimitHint: Iframe, Shadow DOM, and cross-frame targets still need a separate capture pass.
panel.confirmDeleteBody: This removes the thread from this page. You can undo right after.
panel.titleBodyRequired: Title and opening feedback are required.

drawer.empty: No feedback on this page yet.
drawer.emptyHint: Start inspect or screenshot mode to pin feedback to this page.
drawer.confirmDeleteBody: This removes the thread from this page.

review.clickElement: Click an element to leave feedback

sync.markNeedsTitle: Mark needs a title before sync.
sync.projectLocal: Project is still local-only. Reload the popup after signing in to sync projects.

migrate.noWorkspace: No workspace found for this user. Open the web app once to set one up.
